name: Spicy Bean & Cucumber Salad
recipeIngredient: 11 oz Green Beans, Cooked and Chopped
1 medium Cucumber, Peeled and Finely Chopped
2 tbsp Red Wine or Cider Vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Stir well to ensure even distribution of ingredients.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for about 2 hours or until chilled.
4. Serve chilled.
